modules.module_title: Introduction to Dairy Farming & Indian Dairy Sector
Dairy Farm Management, Housing & Disease Control

questions.question: India me 'White Revolution' (Shwet Kranti) ke janak (father) kaun hain?
questions.explanation: Dr. Verghese Kurien ko India me White Revolution ka janak mana jata hai, unhone Operation Flood shuru kiya tha.

questions.question: Operation Flood ka main objective kya tha?

options.B: Milk production aur supply ko badhana
options.C: Farming me paani ki supply badhana

questions.explanation: Operation Flood ka main maqsad milk production badhana aur rural incomes ko improve karna tha.

questions.question: Amul (Anand Milk Union Limited) ki shuruaat kis state me hui thi?
questions.explanation: Amul ki shuruaat Gujarat ke Anand district se hui thi, jo cooperative movement ka bada example hai.

questions.question: NDDB ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: NDDB ka full form National Dairy Development Board hai, iska HQ Anand, Gujarat me hai.

questions.question: Duniya me sabse zyada Milk Produce karne wala desh kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: India duniya ka sabse bada milk producer desh hai, jo global production me bada share rakhta hai.

questions.question: Dairy farming me startup ke liye primary source of income kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Milk sale hi dairy farm ka sabse bada aur primary source of regular income hota hai.

questions.question: Operation Flood kis year me launch kiya gaya tha?
questions.explanation: Operation Flood ko NDDB dwara 1970 me launch kiya gaya tha.

questions.question: Operation Flood ke kitne phases the?
questions.explanation: Operation Flood ke total 3 phases the (Phase I: 1970-1980, Phase II: 1981-1985, Phase III: 1985-1996).

questions.question: India me milk ke marketing aur distribution ke liye sabse bada network kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Cooperative Societies (jaise Amul, Mother Dairy, Nandini) rural networks ko cities se jodne ka kaam karti hain.

questions.question: Dairy business me raw milk ko collect karne wale point ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Village Dairy Cooperative Society (VDCS) collection center

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle milk village level par cooperative collection center (VDCS) me jama hota hai.

questions.question: Dairy development ke context me 'White Revolution' kis cheez se related hai?
questions.explanation: White Revolution doodh ke utpadan (milk production) ko badhane se related hai.

questions.question: Dairy farming me side-income ke liye kis byproduct ka composting kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Cattle dung ka vermicomposting karke bio-fertilizer banaya jata hai jo achhi side-income deta hai.

questions.question: Operation Flood ka Phase III kis year me end hua tha?
questions.explanation: Operation Flood ka teesra phase 1996 me khatam hua tha, jisse India milk self-sufficient ban gaya.

questions.question: National Dairy Research Institute (NDRI) kaha par situated hai?
questions.explanation: NDRI Karnal, Haryana me sthit hai, jaha dairy research aur breeding par kaam hota hai.

questions.question: Dairy farming me cattle population ke mamle me India ka world rank kya hai?
questions.explanation: India me livestock population (gaay aur bhains) sabse zyada hai, isliye iska rank 1st hai.

questions.question: Sahiwal kis type ki animal breed hai?
questions.explanation: Sahiwal ek mashhoor indigenous cow (gaay) breed hai jo milk yielding capacity ke liye jani jati hai.

questions.question: Murrah breed kis animal se related hai?
questions.explanation: Murrah bhains ki ek behad lokpriya breed hai jiska doodh me fat content kafi high hota hai.

questions.question: Kunjiyen aur kurled (tightly curved) horns kis buffalo breed ki pehchan hai?
questions.explanation: Murrah bhains ke seeng (horns) gol ghumedar (tightly curved) hote hain jo jalebi jaise dikhte hain.

questions.question: Duniya me sabse zyada doodh dene wali exotic (foreign) cow breed kaun si hai?
questions.explanation: Holstein-Friesian (HF) cow breed pure world me sabse zyada volume me doodh dene ke liye jani jati hai.

questions.question: Jersey cow breed origin country kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Jersey cow ka origin English Channel ke Jersey Island (UK) se hua hai.

questions.question: Indigenous (desi) cows ke hump me kya special feature hota hai jagah jo foreign cows me nahi hota?
questions.explanation: Desi gaay ke hump me Surya Ketu Nadi hoti hai jo dhoop se vitamin D aur swarna tatva absorb karti hai, aisi belief hai.

questions.question: Gir cow breed primarily kis state me payi jati hai?
questions.explanation: Gir gaay Gujarat ke Gir forest aur surrounding districts me payi jati hai.

questions.question: Kaun si desi cow breed apne tez daudne aur draught work (kheti/bojha dhone) ke liye jani jati hai?
questions.explanation: Nagori breed ke bail kafi chust aur kheti ke kaam me bahut tez hote hain.

questions.question: Mehsana kis do breeds ke cross se bani buffalo breed hai?
questions.explanation: Mehsana breed, Murrah aur Surti buffalo ke cross breeding se develop hui hai.

questions.question: Sickle-shaped (hansiya ke aakar ke) horns kis buffalo breed me hote hain?
questions.explanation: Surti bhains ke horns flat aur sickle-shaped (hansiya jaise) hote hain.

questions.question: Doodh me sabse zyada Fat content kis buffalo breed ke doodh me hota hai?
questions.explanation: Bhadawari bhains ke doodh me fat content sabse zyada (upto 13%) tak hota hai.

questions.question: Milch breed (dudharu nasal) ka matlab kya hota hai?

options.A: Jo sirf kaam karne ke liye ho
options.B: Jo sirf doodh dene ke liye famous ho
options.C: Jo dono doodh aur kheti ke liye ho
options.D: Jo meat production ke liye ho

questions.explanation: Milch breed un nasalon ko kehte hain jinhe sirf milk production ke liye paala jata hai.

questions.question: Desi gaay ka scientific name kya hai?
questions.explanation: Bos indicus humped (desi) cows ka scientific name hai, jabki Bos taurus bin-hump wali exotic cows ka hai.

questions.question: Buffalo ka scientific name kya hai?
questions.explanation: Bubalus bubalis domestic water buffalo ka scientific name hai.

questions.question: AI (Artificial Insemination) ka main benefit kya hai?

options.B: High-quality bull ke semen se breed improve karna
options.D: Milk fat badhana bina bull ke

questions.explanation: AI se high genetic quality ke bulls ke semen ko door-door tak use karke achhi nasl paida ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Cattle semen ko long term preserve karne ke liye kis liquid me rakha jata hai?
questions.explanation: Liquid Nitrogen (-196 degrees Celsius) me semen straws ko frozen state me preserve kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Liquid Nitrogen ka temperature semen preservation ke liye kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Liquid nitrogen ka temperature -196°C hota hai jo cryopreservation ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Dual-purpose breed (dwi-kajee nasal) kya hoti hai?

options.A: Jo gaay aur bhains dono ka kaam kare
options.B: Doodh aur draught (work) dono ke liye useful breed
options.C: Sirf meat aur leather dene wali breed
options.D: Dono male aur female child ek sath dene wali nasal

questions.explanation: Dual-purpose breed ke male draught work me achhe hote hain aur female achha doodh deti hain (jaise Hariana, Kankrej).

questions.question: Hariana breed kis category me aati hai?
questions.explanation: Hariana cow breed ek popular dual-purpose breed hai jo Haryana aur Delhi regions me payi jata hai.

questions.question: HF (Holstein Friesian) aur Desi breed ke cross-breeding se bani nasal ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Crossbred cows exotic breeds ki milk yield aur local breeds ki disease resistance ko combine karti hain.

questions.question: Cattle food me 'Roughage' (chara) ka main source kya hai?

options.B: Dry fodder & Green fodder (Bhusa aur hara chara)

questions.explanation: Dry fodder (bhusa, karbi) aur green fodder roughage ke under aate hain jo animal ke digestion ko sahi rakhte hain.

questions.question: Concentrate feed (pashu aahar) me kya rich hota hai?
questions.explanation: Concentrate feed (jaise khali, chokar, grains) me fiber kam aur nutrients (protein/energy) zyada hote hain.

questions.question: Green fodder (hara chara) me kaun sa nutrient sabse zyada paya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Hare chare me carotene hota hai jo body me jaakar Vitamin A banta hai aur isme moisture content achha hota hai.

questions.question: Barseem (Egyptian Clover) kis season ka green fodder hai?
questions.explanation: Barseem sardiyon (winter season) ka sabse popular aur nutritious hara chara hai.

questions.question: Green fodder ko preservation karke banaye gaye dry material ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Hare chare ko dhoop me sukhakar preserve karne ko 'Hay making' kehte hain.

questions.question: Fodder (chara) ko lactic acid fermentation dwara anaerobic condition me preserve karne par kya banta hai?
questions.explanation: Hare chare ko bin hawa ke (anaerobic) gaddhe (silo) me dakar fermentation karne se 'Silage' banta hai.

questions.question: Silage banane ke liye kaun si crop sabse best maani jati hai?
questions.explanation: Maize (makka) me sugar content high hota hai jo fermentation process aur lactic acid banane ke liye best hai.

questions.question: Dairy animals ko mineral mix (khanij mishran) dena kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Bone health, reproduction aur milk yield sahi rakhne ke liye
options.C: Doodh ko jaldi nikalne ke liye
options.D: Doodh ko kharab hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Mineral mixture dene se pashu ki immunity, reproductive health aur calcium-phosphorus level balance rehta hai.

questions.question: Ek lactating cow ko average kitna paani peene ke liye chahiye daily?

options.C: 35-50 liters (or more depending on milk yield)

questions.explanation: Ek gaay ko daily 35-50+ liters paani chahiye kyunki doodh me lagbhag 87% paani hota hai.

questions.question: Green fodder me HCN (Hydrocyanic acid) poisoning kis crop ko dry condition me khilane se ho sakti hai?
questions.explanation: Jowar (sorghum) jab chhota aur dry conditions me hota hai, toh usme Dhurrin (HCN) hota hai jo pashu ke liye zehrila ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Pashu aahar (concentrate) me dry matter ke alawa kitna Crude Protein (CP) hona chahiye basic guidelines ke hisab se?
questions.explanation: Lactating pashu aahar me crude protein ka level lagbhag 18-22% hona chahiye.

questions.question: Urea Molasses Mineral Block (UMMB) ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Dry season me protein aur minerals supplement karne ke liye
options.B: Diseases ko cure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: UMMB lick block dry season me low-quality dry fodder ko pachane aur nitrogen ki kami door karne me help karta hai.

questions.question: Doodh nikalne se pehle animals ko khilaye jane wale aahar ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Milk production ke proportion me diye jaane wale feeding ko Production ration kehte hain.

questions.question: Cattle Feed me chokar (wheat bran) ka main function kya hai?

options.A: Fiber aur laxative action (pet saaf rakhna)

questions.explanation: Wheat bran (chokar) pashu ke pet ko thik rakhta hai aur digest hone me easy hota hai.

questions.question: Bypass Protein technology ka dairy farming me kya role hai?

options.A: Protein seedhe rumen me tootne ke bajay abomasum/intestine me pache
options.B: Protein bypass ho jaye bina digest hue
options.C: Protein ki quantity double karna chara me

questions.explanation: Bypass protein rumen micro-organisms se bacha kar seedhe true stomach me pachti hai, jisse milk aur fat yield dono badhti hain.

questions.question: Dairy farm ke liye zameen kis type ki honi chahiye?

options.B: Unchi aur dry zameen jaha paani na rukta ho

questions.explanation: Dairy shed hamesha thode unche sthan par hona chahiye taaki baarish ka paani aur mutra (urine) aasaani se nikal sake.

questions.question: Pashuon ke liye modern housing me 'Tail-to-Tail' system ka kya advantage hai?

options.A: Milking aur cleaning easy ho jati hai
options.B: Cattle aapas me ladte nahi hain

questions.explanation: Tail-to-Tail arrangement me bich me bada passage hota hai jisse gobar uthana aur milking karna aasan hota hai.

questions.question: FMD (Foot and Mouth Disease / Khurpaka-Muhpaka) kis wajah se hota hai?
questions.explanation: FMD ek highly contagious viral disease hai jo pashuon ke khur (hooves) aur muh me chhale paida karta hai.

questions.question: HS (Haemorrhagic Septicaemia / Galghotu) disease kis karan hota hai?
questions.explanation: Galghotu (HS) disease Pasteurella multocida naamak bacteria se hota hai, jisme pashu ka gala soojh jata hai aur saans lene me takleef hoti hai.

questions.question: Dairy farm me Mastitis (Thanela) disease kis part ko affect karta hai?
questions.explanation: Thanela (Mastitis) than (udder) ki bimari hai jo bacterial infection se hoti hai aur doodh kharab ho jata hai.

questions.question: Calf (bachhde) ke janam ke turant baad maa ke pehle doodh ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Colostrum (kheen) immunoglobulins se bharpoor hota hai jo naye calf ko immunity deta hai.

questions.question: Newborn calf ko colostrum janam ke kitne samay ke andar pilana chahiye?
questions.explanation: Janam ke pehle do ghante ke andar colostrum pilana sabse best hota hai taaki antibodies absorb ho sakein.

questions.question: Calves me seeng aane se rokne ke liye 'Dehorning' (singhrodhan) kis age me karna best hota hai?

options.D: Dehorning chemical se nahi ho sakti

questions.explanation: 1-2 weeks ki age me dehorning chemically (KOH stick se) ya electrically dehorner se aasaani se aur bina dard ke ho jati hai.

questions.question: Dehorning ke liye kis chemical stick ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Caustic Potash (KOH) ya Sodium Hydroxide (NaOH) sticks ko calf ke horn bud par ragda jata hai.

questions.question: Mastitis (Thanela) se bachne ke liye milking ke baad kis chemical ka udder dip kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Teat dipping (Iodine/Chlorhexidine solution me than ko dubana) milking ke baad bacterial infection ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Cattle shed me gobar ko saaf karne ke liye banyae gaye system ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Shed ke piche bani drainage naali gobar aur peshab ko aasaani se clean karne ke liye hoti hai.

questions.question: Garmi ke dino me buffaloes ko cooling dene ke liye pani me chhodne ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Buffaloes ka skin color black hota hai aur sweat glands kam hote hain, isliye unhe thanda rakhne ke liye wallowing (paani me baitna) zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ectoparasites (jaise kilni, joon/ticks, lice) ko door karne ke liye cattle par kya kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Ticks aur lice ko hatane ke liye cattle shed aur animal body par antiparasitic spray kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Deworming (anthelmintic) dawa kab di jani chahiye?

options.A: Pashu ke pet ke kide (worms) marne ke liye har 3-6 mahine me
options.C: Pregnancy ke last week me daily

questions.explanation: Deworming pashuon ke digestive system se parasites/worms ko saaf karne ke liye regularly har 3 se 6 mahine me ki jati hai.

questions.question: Milk Fever bimari kis nutrient ki kami (deficiency) ke karan hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Calving (doodh dene) ke turant baad body me Calcium ki extreme kami hone se pashu collapse ho jata hai, jise Milk Fever kehte hain.

questions.question: Milking (doodh nikalne) ka sabse best aur hygienical hand method kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Full hand milking (fisting) se than par barabar pressure padta hai aur chot nahi lagti. Knuckling se than kharab ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Milking process start karne ke baad kitne samay me doodh poora nikal lena chahiye?
questions.explanation: Oxytocin hormone ka asar sirf 5-7 minutes tak rehta hai, isliye doodh jaldi nikal lena chahiye.

questions.question: Kaun sa hormone cow/buffalo me 'Milk Let-down' (doodh utarne) ke liye responsible hai?
questions.explanation: Oxytocin hormone udder muscles ko contract karke milk let-down me help karta hai.

questions.question: Doodh nikalne ki machines me kaun sa principle use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Milking machines vacuum pressure aur pulsation create karke mechanical milking karti hain.

questions.question: Lactometer ka use kis cheez ko check karne ke liye kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Lactometer milk ki specific gravity batata hai, jisse doodh me paani ki milawat (adulteration) ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Pure milk ki specific gravity average kitni hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Milk ki specific gravity 1.028 se 1.032 ke beech hoti hai. Paani ki specific gravity 1.000 hoti hai.

questions.question: Gerber method ka use laboratory me kya test karne ke liye kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Gerber test ya Gerber centrifuge method milk fat percentage check karne ka standard chemical method hai.

questions.question: Gerber fat test me kis acid ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Gerber test me protein ko dissolve karne aur fat ko alag karne ke liye concentrated Sulphuric Acid (90-91%) use hota hai.

questions.question: Doodh me 'SNF' ka kya matlab hota hai?
questions.explanation: SNF ka full form 'Solid Not Fat' hota hai. Isme fat ke alawa sabhi solids jaise protein, lactose aur minerals aate hain.

questions.question: Cow milk me average kitna percent fat aur SNF hota hai standard norms ke hisab se?
questions.explanation: Desi aur standard cow milk me lagbhag 3.5% se 4.0% fat aur 8.5% SNF paya jata hai.

questions.question: Buffalo milk me average fat percentage kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Buffalo milk me fat levels high hote hain, generally 6.0% se 8.0% ke beech.

questions.question: Mastitis (Thanela) bimari ko check karne ke liye farm par kaun sa field test kiya jata hai?

options.B: Strip Cup Test / California Mastitis Test (CMT)

questions.explanation: CMT reagent test aur Strip Cup me shuruati milk streaks dekhkar mastitis detect kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Doodh nikalne se pehle than ko dhone ke liye kis solution ka use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Lal dawa (Potassium Permanganate / KMnO4) ka halka ghol

questions.explanation: Potassium permanganate (laal dawa) ka bohot light pink solution disinfect karne ke liye best aur safe mana jata hai.

questions.question: Milk me milaye jaane wale urea aur starch ka main reason kya hota hai?

options.D: Doodh ko jaldi kharab hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Urea nitrogen levels (protein representation) badhata hai aur starch SNF level ko fake tarike se increase karne ke liye milaya jata hai.

questions.question: Synthetic Milk (nakli doodh) banane ke liye kin cheezon ka misuse kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Nakli doodh detergent (emulsification ke liye), urea (nitrogen ke liye) aur refined oil (fat ke liye) ko mila kar banaya jata hai jo sehat ke liye behad khatarnak hai.

questions.question: Milk me starch (rice water) ki adulteration check karne ke liye kis reagent ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Iodine test se doodh me starch hone par blue color aata hai, jo adulteration confirm karta hai.

questions.question: Clean Milk Production (CMP) ka matlab kya hai?

options.A: Doodh nikalne se pehle use kapde se channa
options.B: Doodh nikalne wale person, animal, utensils aur environment ki cleanliness
options.C: Doodh me detergent daal kar saaf karna

questions.explanation: CMP me pashu ka swasthya, bartan ki safai, milker ki hygiene aur barn (shed) ki cleanliness sabhi aate hain.

questions.question: Milk collection centers par milk ka temperature jaldi se 4°C karne ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Raw milk ko BMC me 4°C par chill kiya jata hai taaki bacteria grow na ho aur doodh phate nahi.

questions.question: Doodh me payi jane wali natural sugar kaun si hai?
questions.explanation: Lactose doodh ki carbohydrate/sugar hai jo ise meetha swad deti hai.

questions.question: Cow milk ka yellow color kis pigment ki presence ki wajah se hota hai?
questions.explanation: Carotene ki presence se cow milk thoda peela (yellowish) dikhta hai. Casein milk ko white color deta hai.

questions.question: Milk Pasteurization ka main target kya hota hai?

options.B: Sabhi pathogenic (bimari failane wale) bacteria ko khatam karna

questions.explanation: Pasteurization ka primary target doodh ko human consumption ke liye safe banana aur shelf life badhana hai.

questions.question: HTST Pasteurization me kis temperature aur kitne time tak hold kiya jata hai milk ko?
questions.explanation: HTST (High Temperature Short Time) pasteurization me doodh ko 71.7°C (72°C) par 15 seconds ke liye garam kiya jata hai aur turant 4°C par thanda kiya jata hai.

questions.question: LTH (Low Temperature Holding) pasteurization standard kya hai?
questions.explanation: Batch pasteurization (LTH) me doodh ko 63°C (145°F) par 30 minutes ke liye garam kiya jata.

questions.question: Milk me se cream (fat) ko mechanical force se alag karne wali machine ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Cream separator centrifugal force ka use karke high-density skimmed milk aur low-density cream ko alag karta hai.

questions.question: Cream nikalne ke baad bache hue doodh ko kya kehte hain jisme fat lagbhag zero hota hai?
questions.explanation: Skimmed milk me fat content 0.1% se 0.5% tak reh jata hai aur isme SNF kafi achha hota hai.

questions.question: Ghee banane ke liye butter/malai ko kitne temperature par boil kiya jata hai clarification ke liye?
questions.explanation: Butter ko 110-120°C par garam karne se poora moisture evaporated ho jata hai aur clear ghee alag hota hai.

questions.question: Paneer banane ke liye milk ko coagulate (phadne) ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Paneer acid coagulation product hai jo citric acid, lactic acid ya lemon juice se milk ko phad kar banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Dahi (curd) jamane ke liye kis bacterium ka inoculation (starter culture) daala jata hai?
questions.explanation: Lactic Acid Bacteria (LAB) milk lactose ko lactic acid me convert karte hain jisse doodh curd ban jata hai.

questions.question: Toned Milk (standard market milk) me kitna percent fat aur SNF hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Toned milk me FSSAI standards ke according minimum 3.0% Fat aur 8.5% SNF hona chahiye.

questions.question: Double Toned Milk me kitna fat level hota hai?
questions.explanation: Double Toned milk me fat percentage minimum 1.5% aur SNF minimum 9.0% hota hai.

questions.question: Khoa (Mawa) kis dairy processing method se banaya jata hai?

options.B: Heat desiccation (slow evaporation under continuous stirring)

questions.explanation: Khoa ko doodh ko lagatar kadhai me chalate hue boil karke dry product banane tak desiccate kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Butter (makkhan) me average kitna percent fat hota hai?
questions.explanation: Standard butter me minimum 80% fat hota hai, baqi moisture aur salt hota hai.

questions.question: Ghee me fat percentage kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Ghee almost pure milk fat hota hai jisme 99.5%+ fat hota hai aur moisture bilkul na ke barabar hota hai.

questions.question: Homogenization process ka main purpose kya hai?

options.A: Milk fat globules ko break karke barabar size me pure milk me distribute karna taaki cream layer na bane

questions.explanation: Homogenization se fat globules chhote ho jate hain aur poore doodh me mix rehte hain, jisse doodh ke upar malai ki layer jaldi nahi jamti.

questions.question: Dairy products ko packaged form me sell karne ke liye kis authority ki safety certification mandatory hai India me?

options.A: FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India)

questions.explanation: India me kisi bhi packaged food product ko bechne ke liye FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) ka license ya registration zaroori hai.
